TUT_INGAME_MESSAGE_0001.Text: Move your character with .

TUT_INGAME_MESSAGE_0002.Text: You can dash with . Performing a dash consumes the Dash Gauge, which recovers while you're on the ground. Jump during a dash to trigger a dash jump, letting you jump higher than normal.

TUT_INGAME_MESSAGE_0003.Text: You can jump with . Press again while jumping to perform a double jump.

TUT_INGAME_TASK_MESSAGE_0014.Text: Raise your Cursed Energy Level to 2 with Combo Techniques/Extraction Techniques.

TUT_INGAME_MESSAGE_0004.Text: Attack with . You can also attack with and . Use at the same time to unleash a different attack.

TUT_INGAME_MESSAGE_0005.Text: Continually focus your attacks on one enemy character during battle and your attacks will automatically target that enemy. When fighting multiple foes, you can switch targets with and .

TUT_INGAME_MESSAGE_0006.Text: You need a Curse to exorcise a Curse—that's where Cursed Energy Techniques come in. These are your basic ways to deal damage to enemies. and unleash different Cursed Energy Techniques. You must fill the Cursed Energy Gauge with Cursed Energy to use these Techniques. Cursed Energy Gauge recovery occurs over time, even as you consume it.

TUT_INGAME_MESSAGE_0007.Text:
Attacks that raise your <GLO=GLS_GAME_WORDS_1503> are called <GLO=GLS_GAME_WORDS_1302>s.
Hit enemies with <GLO=GLS_GAME_WORDS_1302>s to fill your <GLO=GLS_GAME_WORDS_1503> Gauge. When you reach certain points on your gauge, your <GLO=GLS_GAME_WORDS_1401> will increase. 
Leveling up strengthens your <GLO=GLS_GAME_WORDS_1307>s, allowing you to deal more damage.

TUT_INGAME_MESSAGE_0008.Text: Press repeatedly to unleash Combo Techniques that mix Extraction Techniques and Cursed Energy Techniques. If you have sufficient Cursed Energy when you unleash a Combo Technique, the final blow will be a Cursed Energy Technique.

TUT_INGAME_MESSAGE_0009.Text: Use to guard against enemy attacks. All damage received is nullified while guarding. Still, taking too many attacks will result in a guard break. Be careful, as this leaves you wide open! If you guard just as an enemy attack lands, you will execute a Perfect Guard, giving you a chance to counterattack.

TUT_INGAME_MESSAGE_0010.Text: Use while guarding to perform a step. This will move in the direction of the input to avoid enemy attacks.

TUT_INGAME_MESSAGE_0011.Text:
Hit enemies with Extraction Techniques to raise your Cursed Energy.
Use Cursed Energy Techniques to reduce enemy health until you defeat them.

Defeat your enemies and reduce your opponent's Team Gauge to zero to achieve victory.

TUT_INGAME_CHARACTER_MESSAGE_0001.Text: Let's get on with your special training!

TUT_INGAME_CHARACTER_MESSAGE_0003.Text: First, why don't you make your way over to me?

TUT_INGAME_CHARACTER_MESSAGE_0005.Text: Next, try to land an attack on me.

TUT_INGAME_CHARACTER_MESSAGE_0006.Text: Don't blame me if you get hurt.

TUT_INGAME_CHARACTER_MESSAGE_0007.Text: You're already head and shoulders above most when it comes to close combat.

TUT_INGAME_CHARACTER_MESSAGE_0008.Text: Now it's my turn. See if you can handle my attack.

TUT_INGAME_CHARACTER_MESSAGE_0010.Text: Last, but not least, I'll teach you how to control your Cursed Energy!

TUT_INGAME_CHARACTER_MESSAGE_0011.Text: Try imbuing Cursed Energy into your martial arts and hitting me.

TUT_INGAME_CHARACTER_MESSAGE_0012.Text: I already know how to do that!

TUT_INGAME_CHARACTER_MESSAGE_0013.Text: Then give it a try, not that I think you can't.

TUT_INGAME_CHARACTER_MESSAGE_0014.Text: That punch had zero Cursed Energy.

TUT_INGAME_CHARACTER_MESSAGE_0015.Text: I guess you're the type that learns by doing, huh?

TUT_INGAME_CHARACTER_MESSAGE_0016.Text: Come at me then—no holding back.

TUT_INGAME_MESSAGE_0101.Text: You can command ally characters during battle by using . Normal: Engages in a balanced variety of actions. Aggressive: Frequently uses Extraction Techniques and Cursed Energy Techniques. Cooperative: Aims to coordinate with you. Cautious: Uses step and guard frequently to avoid damage.

TUT_INGAME_MESSAGE_0102.Text:
Trigger a Cooperation Bonus by attacking the same enemy as your ally, or by attacking an enemy attacking your ally.
Trigger this bonus to get extra <GLO=GLS_GAME_WORDS_1505>!

TUT_INGAME_MESSAGE_0103.Text: Unleash a Joint Attack Technique with +. Joint Attack Techniques cannot be guarded against, and enemies hit by one enter a special stagger state. If an ally lands a Combo Technique or Extraction Technique in this state, a Joint Attack is triggered with that ally. A Joint Attack raises the Cursed Energy Level for both you and your ally, allowing you to deal massive damage.

TUT_INGAME_MESSAGE_0104.Text: When your Cursed Energy Level is maxed out, you gain access to an Awakened Move. Activate it with + . From powerful attacks to Domain Expansions, each character's has a different effect. Awakened Moves can only be activated once per battle.

TUT_INGAME_TASK_MESSAGE_0201.Text: Max out your Cursed Energy Level.

TUT_INGAME_MESSAGE_0201.Text:
Some characters can activate a Domain Expansion with their Awakened Move.

A successful Domain Expansion will pull enemy and ally alike into your Domain. 
You gain advantages while inside your Domain, such as improved abilities and increased damage, while enemies suffer from negative effects.

TUT_INGAME_MESSAGE_0202.Text:
A Domain Expansion will end when time runs out,
the user is defeated, or another Domain Expansion causes it
to be erased. With some Domain Expansions, activation,
attack, and deactivation all happen in sequence.

Note that some characters may have limitations on
Cursed Energy Techniques for some time after their
Domain Expansion ends.

TUT_INGAME_MESSAGE_0301.Text:
Mahoraga has the ability to adapt to and nullify attacks.
Mahoraga will adapt to Cursed Energy Techniques that were used
to bring it down and will no longer take damage from them.
The corresponding icon on its eight-handled wheel will light
up for any technique it adapts to.

Damage can also be dealt through Awakened Moves.
Be sure to end Mahoraga once and for all with an Awakened Move.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_0001.Text:
You can experience the story of Jujutsu Kaisen in Story Mode.

• Match Records: Relive the trials and tribulations of
Jujutsu Kaisen.
• Relationship Chart: Check the relationships between
characters.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_0101.Text: Select missions to play the story in chronological order. Some missions come with special victory conditions or waves. Check mission details with .

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_0102.Text: As you progress through the Case Records, characters are unlocked on the Relationship Chart and relationships will evolve. It pays to check in on the chart from time to time! You can also move to the Relationship Chart with .

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_0201.Text:
Here you can check the relationships between characters.
Raise character Relationship Strength as the Case Records progresses, letting you earn rewards and view unlocked short stories.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_0301_10.Text:
Connect to the network to battle online.

• Exhibition Battle: Enjoy casual matches with
other players.
• Ranked Battle: Take on challenging matches against players
of a similar skill level.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_0301_20.Text:
Match results and scores will affect your Player Rank.
You can also earn rewards for your overall score.
Use Player Info to see detailed information.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_0401_10.Text:
Connect to the network to team up with online players
in a series of battles against enemies with special rules.

• Rush Battle: Cooperate with other players in a series of
wave-based battles that change every time you play.
Complete tasks, take down foes, and aim for a high score!
There are also battles with special win conditions.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_0401_20.Text:
• Survival Battle:
A mode throwing you against even stronger foes than in
Rush Battle. Try and conquer the gauntlet for yourself!

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_0402.Text:
Try out Rush Battle first, and see how the mode goes.
The first time will be an offline battle.

After that, you can select "Play Alone" to enjoy the offline version at any time!

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_0403.Text:
Playing Rush Battle affects your Skill Level. Raising Skill
Level incrementally changes Rush Battle's difficulty and
battle structure. Co-op players with similar Skill Levels are
prioritized in matching. Adjust your Skill Level when
entering combat to adjust difficulty. (If you enter combat
with a lowered Skill Level, Skill Level limit will not rise.)

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_0404.Text:
And in Online Co-op, you can strengthen yourself with special equip items, or by training your characters.
Play Rush Battle or Survival Battle to obtain EXP and reinforce your characters.

Use reinforcement to make short work of harder battles.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_0501.Text:
Equip items bought at the Shop to reinforce your character.
By training your character, you will become able to equip
up to three items. However, you cannot equip multiple items
from the same category.

Equip items include permanent types, types that disappear
after one use, and more.
Playing Online Co-op may add new items to the Shop.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_0502.Text:
Use EXP earned by playing Rush Battle and Survival Battle to level up your characters.
This boosts their stats and unlocks equip slots.

EXP is shared no matter what character you play as, so allot it however you like.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_0601.Text:
In Online Co-op, you can impose Binding Vows on yourself.
Imposing Binding Vows places restrictions on
your actions and stats, but other abilities are boosted.

Complete missions with Binding Vows to earn extra
recovery points.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_0701.Text:
On the Interval screen, you can recover the Team Gauge
and characters' health for the next mission.
Each recovery requires points,
and each player has their own points for recovery,
so use them wisely!

These recovery points are earned when you clear missions.
Completing missions with Binding Vows imposed earns you
additional points.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_0801.Text:
Freely set characters and rules for battle.

• Character Settings:
Adjust character selection and strength for allies and opponents.

• Player Settings:
Adjust special settings.

• Battle Settings:
Adjust rules for stages, time limits, Cursed Energy, and more.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_0901_10.Text:
Connect to the network to create online lobbies.
Play with set members—either friends or strangers.

• Create Lobby: Become a host and create a lobby.
Change the Play Style and Call for Entries to recruit players
that suit your style.

• Lobby Search: Join created lobbies.
Friend or ID search lets you directly join specific lobbies.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_0901_20.Text:
• Character Selection: Select a character to control
in the lobby. You can select a different character in battle,
so join the lobby with your favorite!

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_1001_10.Text: The lobby host begins the battle by holding . Start once all of your members are ready to go.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_1001_20.Text: You can also open the menu with to do the following: • Combat Mode Settings: Set the battle mode to be played by lobby members. • Kick Player: Kick a player from your lobby. You can use these controls from Lobby Information.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_1002_10.Text: You can do the following in an online lobby: • Preset Messages: Use preset messages with . • Show/Hide UI: Toggle the UI on and off with .

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_1002_20.Text: • Switch Camera Mode: Switch to a mode that lets you freely move the camera with . Battles will begin when the lobby host decides. You can leave a lobby by opening the menu with .

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_1101.Text: After earning Juju Points in battles and so on, you can spend it to purchase outfits, Player Card customization items, items for Online Co-op battles, and more. Some items become available by fulfilling certain conditions.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_1102.Text: Cursed Seal Boxes contain random items from the Shop that do not have any unlock conditions. (Items that have unlock conditions are not found in Cursed Seal Boxes.) (When you already own the item or are over the maximum amount of the item obtained, said item is converted into Juju Points.)

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_1201.Text: You can view characters and perform a variety of customizations.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_1202.Text:
Customize your Player Card however you like.

Each customization item can be obtained in battles or the Shop.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_1203.Text:
Customize preset messages to use in battle.

You can customize this for each character, so select messages that suit your play style!

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_1204.Text:
You can customize Vs. Poses and battle voices.

Custom items can be obtained in battle or bought from the Shop.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_1301.Text:
In the add-on content "Special-Grade Mission Records" mode, witness never-before-seen fights between new Jujutsu Sorcerers.
*Purchase of add-on content is required to play.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_1302.Text:
In the downloadable content "Special-Grade Mission Records" mode, witness never-before-seen fights between new Jujutsu Sorcerers.
*Purchase of downloadable content is required to play.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_1303.Text:
In the add-on content "Special-Grade Mission Records" mode, witness never-before-seen fights between new Jujutsu Sorcerers.
*Purchase of downloadable content is required to play.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_1304.Text:
In the add-on content "Special-Grade Mission Records" mode, witness never-before-seen fights between new Jujutsu Sorcerers.
*Purchase of downloadable content is required to play.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_1401.Text:
Team up with a player of your choice and test your skills across five 2-on-2 battles! Just choose a route and a difficulty, then earn Juju Points and plates for beating your opponents!
Looking for a challenge? Try turning up the difficulty or making it through without any game overs!

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_1501.Text: <GLO=GLS_NAME_CN_240> may appear when Rush Battles have been played repeatedly and 3 missions have been completed. The higher the chance of appearance, the more shikigami will appear at the top of the interval screen.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_1601_10.Text:
Fight the nearly invincible Mahoraga.
What makes Mahoraga so formidable is that it is unaffected by Skill Level.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_1601_20.Text:
Mahoraga has the ability to adapt to and nullify attacks.

Mahoraga's Adaptation Gauge will start filling when a Cursed Energy 
or Cursed Tool Technique lands successfully and will continue
to fill over time.
When the gauge is at its max, or Mahoraga is rendered unable to move, 
it will adapt to the technique that caused the most damage while
the gauge was filling and nullify any future damage taken from that move.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_1601_30.Text:
The corresponding icon on its eight-handled wheel will light up for
any technique it adapts to.

After adapting, Mahoraga will target a character it has not adapted to yet.
Damage from Combo Techniques cannot be nullified.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_1601_40.Text:
Mahoraga is always in an invulnerable state, but if it takes enough damage while the Adaptation Gauge is filling up, this state will be lifted, and it will become unable to move.
This is the only time that Awakened Moves or Joint Attacks can be successfully dealt to it.
Only the Awakened Move "Domain Expansion" can be used to switch to a different stage at any time.
Each character can only land one Joint Attack.

TUT_OUTGAME_MESSAGE_1601_50.Text:
Characters under Level 25 will temporarily be boosted to Level 25.
Binding Vows cannot be imposed in battle against Mahoraga.
The effects of equipped items will be applied.
